name: CASS INFORMATION SYSTEMS INC
summary: Cass Information Systems provides payment and information processing services to large manufacturing, distribution, and retail enterprises in the United States. Services include freight invoice rating, payment processing, auditing, transportation and accounting information generation, facility-related invoice processing (electricity, gas, waste, telecom), B2B payments via CassPay, and church management software via TouchPoint. Its bank subsidiary, Cass Commercial Bank, supports payment operations and serves privately held businesses, restaurant franchises, and faith-based ministries.

products.name: FreightPay
products.description: Transportation bill processing and payment service for large enterprises.

products.name: CassPay
products.description: B2B payment platform for clients requiring an agile fintech partner.

products.name: TouchPoint
products.description: Church management software and online generosity platform for faith-based and non-profit organizations.

products.name: Gyve / Generosity Made Simple
products.description: Online platform providing generosity services for faith-based and non-profit organizations.

products.name: Expense$mart / ExpenseSmart
products.description: Expense management reporting and processing service.

products.name: CassPort
products.description: Proprietary internet management delivery system for reports, digital images, and data retrieval.

products.name: Ratemaker / Best Rate / Rate Exchange
products.description: Transportation freight rating and best-rate determination services.

products.name: WasteVision
products.description: Waste expense management and payment processing service.

products.name: AcuAudit
products.description: Electronic auditing service for invoice and expense management.

products.name: Direct2Carrier Payments
products.description: Direct payment processing service to carriers.

products.name: Transdata
products.description: Transportation data processing and management service.

products.name: Cass Freight Index
products.description: Freight industry index and benchmarking data service.

partnerships.description: Asset Purchase Agreement for sale of TEM Business Unit for $18M; Transition Services Agreement for IT, data ingestion, and payment processing up to 18 months post-close.
Various ESPs market Cass utility processing services, adding auditing, consulting, and technological capabilities to Cass solutions.
